atomic_structure.topic: POC (Proof of Concept) Identify business problems that can be addressed using generative AI.

Phase 2: Assess Data Requirements and Availability - Evaluate data availability, quality, and accessibility needed for the PoC. Evaluate data availability Evaluate data quality Evaluate data accessibility
Phase 3: Set Clear Success Metrics - Establish metrics to measure the success of the PoC. Establish metrics to measure the success of the PoC.

Phase 4: Address Responsible AI Considerations and Compliance Risks - Ensure responsible AI practices and compliance with relevant regulations. Ensure responsible AI practices Comply with relevant regulations
Phase 5: Time-box Development Efforts - Define a clear timeline for development activities. Define a clear timeline for development activities.
Phase 6: Identify Key Stakeholders and Decision Makers - Engage key stakeholders and decision-makers in the PoC process. Engage key stakeholders and decision-makers
